BLANCO PRINCIPAL $6240.96, ATTORNEY FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $950.00 INTEREST IN THE AMOUNT OF $764.30 AND COURT COSTS OF $104.00 FOR A TOTAL OF $8059.26 PLUS INTEREST OF 10% PER ANNUM.
